<script>
(function() {
  function MeshAnimation(canvasId, opts) {
    var canvas = document.getElementById(canvasId);
    if (!canvas) return;
    var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    var config = Object.assign({
      density: 0.00012,
      maxDistRatio: 0.18,
      baseLineOpacity: 0.12,
      glowThreshold: 0.85,
    }, opts || {});

    var width, height, dpr;
    var nodes = [];
    var startTime = performance.now();
    var rafId = null;

    function resize() {
      dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
      width = canvas.offsetWidth;
      height = canvas.offsetHeight;
      canvas.width = Math.max(1, Math.floor(width * dpr));
      canvas.height = Math.max(1, Math.floor(height * dpr));
      ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
    }

    function initNodes() {
      var area = width * height;
      var count = Math.max(40, Math.min(120, Math.floor(area * config.density)));
      nodes = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        nodes.push({
          x: Math.random(), y: Math.random(),
          baseOp: 0.12 + Math.random() * 0.45,
          phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
          speed: 0.4 + Math.random() * 0.7,
          size: 0.7 + Math.random() * 1.4,
        });
      }
    }

    function frame(now) {
      var t = (now - startTime) / 1000;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
      var maxDist = Math.min(width, height) * config.maxDistRatio;
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
      for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
        var a = nodes[i];
        var ax = a.x * width, ay = a.y * height;
        for (var j = i + 1; j < nodes.length; j++) {
          var b = nodes[j];
          var bx = b.x * width, by = b.y * height;
          var dx = ax - bx, dy = ay - by;
          var dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
          if (dist < maxDist) {
            var distFade = 1 - dist / maxDist;
            var timeFade = 0.35 + 0.35 * Math.sin(t * 0.45 + (i + j) * 0.27);
            var op = distFade * timeFade * config.baseLineOpacity;
            if (op > 0.02) {
              ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(13, 194, 222, ' + op.toFixed(3) + ')';
              ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ax, ay); ctx.lineTo(bx, by); ctx.stroke();
            }
          }
        }
      }
      for (var k = 0; k < nodes.length; k++) {
        var n = nodes[k];
        var pulse = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(t * n.speed + n.phase);
        var op2 = n.baseOp * (0.4 + 0.6 * pulse);
        var cx = n.x * width, cy = n.y * height;
        if (pulse > config.glowThreshold) {
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(13, 194, 222, ' + (op2 * 0.22).toFixed(3) + ')';
          ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, n.size * 3.2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
        }
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(13, 194, 222, ' + op2.toFixed(3) + ')';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, n.size, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
      }
      rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
    }

    function start() { if (rafId !== null) return; startTime = performance.now(); rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame); }

<script>
(function() {
  var section = document.getElementById('quotes');
  if (!section) return;
  var slides = section.querySelectorAll('.quote-slide');
  var dots = section.querySelectorAll('.quote-dot');
  if (!slides.length || !dots.length) return;

  var current = 0;
  var timer;

  function show(index) {
    slides[current].classList.remove('active');
    dots[current].classList.remove('active');
    current = index;
    slides[current].classList.add('active');
    dots[current].classList.add('active');
  }

  function next() { show((current + 1) % slides.length); }
  function startTimer() { timer = setInterval(next, 6000); }
  function resetTimer() { clearInterval(timer); startTimer(); }

  dots.forEach(function(dot) {
    dot.addEventListener('click', function() {
      show(parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-target'), 10));
      resetTimer();
    });
  });

  startTimer();
})();
</script>
